title: Full Coding Process — Feature Development
description: Standard workflow for OpenCrabs development. Covers the complete pipeline from investigation through merge, following the project coding process.
context: This plan follows the OpenCrabs coding process for features larger than 100 lines or 5+ steps. Each stage must be completed before the next begins.
risks: Forgetting to update the PR checklist
Missing edge cases in test coverage
Not running the full CI suite before merge
test_strategy: Run existing tests first, then add new tests for the feature, then run full suite with --all-features

tasks.title: Investigate
tasks.description: Run cargo check, cargo test. Understand the affected codebase area. Trace the issue or feature path.

tasks.title: Plan
tasks.description: Create or import task list with plan tool. Present to user for approval before executing.

tasks.title: TDD — Write failing test
tasks.description: Write a regression or behaviour test that captures the expected behaviour. Must fail before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Test fails with a clear message

tasks.title: Implement fix/feature
tasks.description: Write the implementation. Keep it minimal — enough to pass the test.

tasks.title: Checks
tasks.description: Run cargo clippy, cargo fmt --check, cargo test. All must pass.

tasks.title: Code Review
tasks.description: Open a PR. Address review comments. Ensure CI pipeline passes.

tasks.title: Merge
tasks.description: Squash-merge the PR. Update changelog if applicable.
